mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.course_name, c.description, c.coach_id, u.username AS coach_name, u.avatar AS coach_avatar, c.category, c.day_of_week, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.capacity, c.booked_count, (c.capacity - c.booked_count) AS remaining_count, c.status, c.image_url, c.difficulty_level, c.duration_minutes, c.calories_min, c.calories_max FROM fitness_course c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.coach_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} AND c.deleted = false
